articles.title: UFC 329: McGregor vs. Holloway 2 media day | Weds. @ 2:45 p.m. ET
articles.description: Before UFC 329 on Saturday, main card fighters, including Conor McGregor vs. Max Holloway, will speak to reporters at media day beginning Wednesday at roughly 2:45 p.m. ET/11:45 a.m. PT.
